variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 18105 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 18105 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 18105 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 274.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 166.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 19.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 501.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 490.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF975M Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18105
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF975M Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 18105
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF975M axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
